title: The Story of Dr. Wassell
writer: Alan Le May, Charles Bennett, Corydon M. Wassell
actors: Gary Cooper, Laraine Day, Signe Hasso
plot: When the U.S. forces withdraw from Java, ahead of the Japanese invasion, U.S. Navy doctor Corydon M. Wassell coordinates the remaining wounded servicemen and leads them to safety towards the last Allied evacuation points.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 1 nomination total
